claim: The manuscript was authored by Anthony Ascham (16th-century English physician) using a double arithmetic progression polyalphabetic cipher encoding English text
evidence_against: Method never published in full, making it unverifiable. Could not demonstrate consistent results. Radiocarbon dating (1404-1438) predates claimed author Ascham (1515-1568) by a century.

tests_run.details: Method never published in full, making it unverifiable. Could not demonstrate consistent results. Radiocarbon dating (1404-1438) predates claimed author Ascham (1515-1568) by a century.

reasoning: Historical attempt by Leonell C. Strong (1945). Cipher type: double arithmetic progression / polyalphabetic. Proposed language: English.
source: Strong, L.C. 'Anthony Ascham, the Author of the Voynich Manuscript' (Science, 1945)
